message:
fix(oracle): CapabilitySet::revoke now clears Full meta-capability

When revoking a specific capability from a set that contained Full,
the Full meta-capability was left intact, causing has() to still
return true for revoked capabilities. This was the root cause of the
"known detection gap" in the ambient authority mutation test.

The fix removes Full from the set whenever a specific capability is
revoked, since the set is no longer complete. Individual capabilities
remain intact. This enables the AmbientAuthoritySpawnWithoutCapability
mutation to be properly detected, removing it from the skip list.

Closes bd-6zil8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
